messages.content: 按照正确英文语序和语法重写这句话:As shown in Table 1, our method significantly outperforms the ProtoNet that relies on the global image representations under both settings, achieving a whopping accuracy gain of 7.17% in 5-way 1-shot setting and 3.97% in 5-way 5-shot setting on miniImageNet.This verifies the effectiveness of our method in discovering local parts and utilizing the local features.

As shown in Table 1, our method significantly outperforms the ProtoNet, which relies on global image representations, achieving an impressive accuracy gain of 7.17% in the 5-way 1-shot setting and 3.97% in the 5-way 5-shot setting on miniImageNet under both settings. This confirms the effectiveness of our method in discovering local parts and utilizing local features.

按照正确英文语序和语法重写这句话:The accuracy improvements also show the superiority of the local part representation over the global representation, as local features are more fine-grained and transferable across tasks.
The accuracy improvements also demonstrate the superiority of local part representation over global representation, as local features are more fine-grained and transferable across tasks.

按照正确英文语序和语法重写这句话:We also compare our method with several metricbased baselines that are based on local embedding, including DN4 [24], ATL-Net [9], DC [25] and DeepEMD [53].The results are summarized in Table 1. Our method outperforms all of these methods and achieves significant accuracy gains than the best local-based method (i.e., DeepEMD). This is because previous methods simply adopt the patch representation divided from the feature map and suffer from large randomness. The patches could cover large noises and lose discriminative information contained in the irregular part regions like the head, leg and so on. However, our model can automatically exploit multiple local parts by part filters, and percept the most task-related local features for the current task with a task-aware mechanism.

We also compare our method with several metric-based baselines that are based on local embedding, including DN4 [24], ATL-Net [9], DC [25], and DeepEMD [53]. The results are summarized in Table 1. Our method outperforms all of these methods and achieves significant accuracy gains compared to the best local-based method (i.e., DeepEMD). This is because previous methods simply adopt the patch representation divided from the feature map and suffer from large randomness. The patches could include significant noise and lose discriminative information contained in irregular part regions, such as the head, leg, and so on. In contrast, our model can automatically exploit multiple local parts using part filters and detect the most task-related local features for the current task with a task-aware mechanism.
按照正确英文语序和语法翻译这句话:我们还将我们的方法与几个基于局部嵌入的基于指标的基线进行了比较，包括DN4 [24]、ATL-Net [9]、DC [25]和DeepEMD [53]。结果汇总见表1。我们的方法优于所有这些方法，并比最好的基于局部的方法（即DeepEMD）获得了显著的精度收益。这是因为以前的方法只是采用了从特征图中分离出来的补丁表示，并且存在很大的随机性。

We also compared our method with several metric-based baselines that are based on local embedding, including DN4 [24], ATL-Net [9], DC [25], and DeepEMD [53]. The results are summarized in Table 1. Our method outperforms all of these methods and achieves significant accuracy gains compared to the best local-based method (i.e., DeepEMD). This is because previous methods simply adopted the patch representation derived from the feature map and suffered from significant randomness.
简要概括下deepEMD网络

DeepEMD is a neural network architecture that leverages Earth Mover's Distance (EMD) as the primary metric for measuring the similarity between data points. EMD is a powerful metric that computes the minimum cost required to transform one distribution into another. DeepEMD uses this concept to effectively compare and match feature distributions in deep learning tasks, such as image classification and matching. By incorporating EMD in the network, DeepEMD provides a more robust and effective approach for handling complex and diverse data patterns.
按照正确英文语序和语法翻译这句话:这是因为以前的方法采用了从整张特征图中分离出补丁表示，但实际上这会这些导致分离的补丁表示存在很大的随机性。

This is because previous methods adopted patch representation separated from the entire feature map, but in reality, this separation leads to significant randomness in the extracted patch representation.

按照正确英文语序和语法重写这句话:Aircraft [28] contains 10,000 airplane images of 100 models.The main challenge of this benchmark is the similarity by the symbol of the airline. Although the types of aircraft are different, the symbol can be equivalent when they belong to the same airline, making it more difficult. Following [42], we preprocess all images of this benchmark based on the bounding box and divide the dataset.

Aircraft [28] consists of 10,000 airplane images from 100 different models. The main challenge of this benchmark is the airline symbol similarity. Even though the aircraft types may be different, the symbols can be identical when they belong to the same airline, making the task more challenging. Following the procedure in [42], we preprocess all images in this benchmark using bounding boxes and then divide the dataset.

按照正确英文语序和语法重写这句话:Stanford Cars [18] contains 16,185 images of 196 classes of cars. Classes are typically at the level of Year, Brand and Model name, e.g., 2012 Tesla Model S and 2012 BMW M3 coupe. This dataset was introduced by [24] for the fewshot classification. Likewise, we adopt the same data split with [24].

Stanford Cars [18] consists of 16,185 images representing 196 car classes. These classes are typically designated by the Year, Brand, and Model name, for example, 2012 Tesla Model S and 2012 BMW M3 coupe. This dataset was introduced by [24] for few-shot classification. Similarly, we follow the same data split as described in [24].

按照正确英文语序和语法重写这句话:Stanford Dogs [15] is also introduced by [24] for finegrained few-shot classification. This dataset contains 20,580 images of 120 breeds of dogs around the world. Our split is the same with [24].

Stanford Dogs [15] was also introduced by [24] for fine-grained few-shot classification. This dataset comprises 20,580 images representing 120 dog breeds from around the world. Our split follows the same approach as in [24].
按照正确英文语序和语法翻译这句话:Then, we 对K 进行维度的缩放操作。具体来说，首先将其维度进行缩小，此时模型会pay more attention on 图中比较具有辨别能力的图像部分。然后我们对K的维度进行放大，此时模型会从已经聚焦的图像部分上进一步再挖掘出更具辨别能力的细粒度特征。

Then, we perform dimension scaling on K. Specifically, we first reduce its dimension, causing the model to pay more attention to the more discriminative parts of the image. Next, we enlarge the dimension of K, allowing the model to further mine more discriminative fine-grained features from the already-focused image parts.
按照正确英文语序和语法翻译这句话:H,W分别是query feature map 的高度与宽度,and each of them 代表一个 query LRF 和一张support image对应的所有support LRFs的relation score.

H and W represent the height and width of the query feature map, respectively, and each of them corresponds to a relation score between a query LRF and all the support LRFs associated with a single support image.
按照正确英文语序和语法翻译这句话:As shown in Figure 1 ,我们首先对转换过的support feature map和query feature map所生成的关系矩阵的每一行进行GAP操作，
As illustrated in Figure 1, we first perform the Global Average Pooling (GAP) operation on each row of the relation matrix generated from the transformed support feature map and query feature map.
按照正确英文语序和语法翻译这句话:We introduce Meta-Learner Filter to filter out the noisy background regions and retain the discriminative part regions with high objectness to 生成一个attention map。
We introduce the Meta-Learner Filter to filter out the noisy background regions and retain the discriminative part regions with high objectness, resulting in the generation of an attention map.
